# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'true'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: user-service
        image: <image-url>
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'true'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: order-service
        image: <image-url>
